title: Telegram sendMessage 400 repair for local Web App URLs
acceptanceCriteria: The proof bundle exists with spec, evidence, verdict, task, problems, and raw artifacts.
Evidence proves the Telegram 400 root cause or an equally strong local reproduction without recording secrets.
Local/non-public Mini App URLs no longer break ordinary bot replies.
Valid public HTTPS Mini App URLs still render Telegram web_app buttons.
Telegram rejection logs include actionable Telegram descriptions when available.
Pairing, auth, approval, policy, delivery-mode, and previous Windows fallback semantics are preserved.
Required bot verification, task validation, and a fresh verifier pass are green.
